name: bash
description: Execute a shell command. Each call spawns a fresh subprocess — `cd`, `export`, and aliases DO NOT persist across calls. Use relative paths (resolved against your session workdir). For multi-step workflows that need shared environment, use `session_shell` instead.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds. Omit to use the default (30s).

stdin.description: Optional string piped to the command's stdin. Useful for pre-feeding interactive prompts (e.g. 'y\n' for apt/brew).
